overview.title: Overview
overview.description: We are committed to delivering your order quickly, safely, and conveniently. Below are the main delivery terms.

shippingOptions.title: 2. Delivery Options
shippingOptions.description: We offer the following delivery options:

options.standard: Standard delivery – carried out by our company’s delivery service.
options.express: Express delivery – available for an additional fee..

items.typical: Delivery time depends on the type of order, delivery location, and shipping method.
items.weekends: Usually, orders are delivered within 3-5 business days.
items.preorder: In case of potential delays, our team will contact you.

items.costs: Delivery is free within 20 km; beyond 20 km, the cost is 150 AMD per each additional kilometer.
items.duties: For low-value purchases, delivery within Yerevan and to the regions will be carried out with an additional charge.

delaysDamageLoss.title: 4. Possible Delays
delaysDamageLoss.descriptionBefore: Despite our efforts, in some cases, delivery may be delayed due to:
delaysDamageLoss.descriptionAfter: We will inform you of any possible delays while ensuring transparent communication.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: For shipping questions or special handling requests, contact us at
